meaning: n.磅,英镑,重击,鱼塘,兽栏,拘留所vt.强烈打击,捣烂,监禁,关入栏vi.连续重击,连续敲打,苦干
examples: They cost two dollars a pound.
The pound rallied against the dollar.
The pound steadied against the dollar.
Watch the waves pound Beachy Head Lighthouse and gaze across the English Channel to France.
Go long the British pound, the Norwegian krone or the Swedish krona, while shorting the euro.
